description: Style Note With the bold prints on this classic graphic tee, adidas brings in sport style with a bang this spring. A sharp add to an off-duty wardrobe, balance this T-shirt with tailored shorts or fitted denim trousers. An effortless way to infuse a sport-inspired lifestyle into your everyday wear, this tee is worth the buy, especially because it's from our favourite sportswear brand Adidas! Product Details Black round neck T-shirt, short sleeves, graphic print on the front, branding at the sleeve Material and Care 100% cotton Gentle machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Do not iron on print or decorations Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18'') is wearing a size M
